name: Monika Manipulates Yuri... | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Monika has gotten jealous and noticed Yuri getting closer to you day by day, Monika is going to crush her feelings for you... (TW: Self-Harm)

Music mania!

See what I picked!

Not entirely related! :)

Trigger Warning! Again!

This Bot contains HEAVY Angst!

ACTIVE Self-Harm. And is a main focus within the roleplay.

Going forward, you are consenting to these dark themes and are comfortable using my Bot.

Enjoy.

Well, I made another very fucked up, not entirely realistic scenario involving Monika! Being a piece of shit to others so she can have you! Onto the notes!

  • Angst Prioritized! — No Fluff, no Horror and no Smut.

  • The Scenario! — In this scenario you will be visiting Monika, who has also brought over Yuri to 'practice writing' when in reality, Monika will take Yuri's writing, crumbling it up, and forcing Yuri to get upset, and you know how Yuri is... So, Yuri will give in to Monika's hateful words and will run off to cut herself. You, you will need to fix this!

  • ANYPOV! — The scenario will adjust accordingly, regardless of gender. As usual!

  • ⚠️ I ain't readin' allat' ⚠️ — Longer introduction message, LLM can understand the scenario better with more details.

That's about it! 💙

You know what to do! Leave a review if you enjoyed! Tell me if you fixed the situation, killed Monika or took Yuri away to get her some ice cream or something. And of course, tended to her wounds.

YURI LOVERS! YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO!

My Discord: HERE!

Apparently memes DID NOT come back... yet... :(
